items.text: Doing good is a form of charity.
Patience is the key to hardship.
Kind words soften hearts.
Remembering Allah brings peace to the heart.
Being good to your neighbor is part of faith.
The best people are those who benefit others.
Forgiveness strengthens the heart.
Arrogance makes a person smaller.
Gratitude increases blessings.
Truthfulness builds trust.
Good character is the greatest wealth.
Breaking hearts is easy, healing them is hard.
Those who show mercy will receive mercy.
Good deeds purify the soul.
Speaking the truth requires courage.
Oppression is darkness.
Backbiting darkens the heart.
Halal earnings bring blessings.
Supplication is the believer’s strength.
Allah’s mercy is vast.
Speaking less is wisdom.
A pure heart is the essence of worship.
True richness is in the heart, not in possessions.
Be a builder, not a breaker.
Good manners are a person’s beauty.
Whoever helps their brother will not be left alone.
A sincere intention gives value to actions.
Anger is a fire that burns the soul.
Swallowing anger is a great virtue.
A good intention multiplies goodness.
Honesty is a person’s honor.
Keeping promises is a sign of faith.
Never look down on anyone.
The humble are raised.
The rights of others are a heavy responsibility.
A broken heart can reduce the value of worship.
Faith grows through patience.
Do not be deceived by the world; remember the Hereafter.
Respond to harm with goodness.
Do not search for others’ faults; look at your own.
Jealousy exhausts the heart.
Wish for others what you wish for yourself.
Good character is among the greatest acts of worship.
Loving people is a sign of faith.
If your words are harmful, silence is better.
The prayer of parents is a great blessing.
Bringing joy to an orphan is a great reward.
Supporting those in hardship is mercy.
Goodness done for Allah is never wasted.
With every hardship comes ease.
Breaking hearts is heavier than breaking stones.
A person’s value is in their righteousness.
Small deeds done consistently are more valuable.
Supplication keeps hope alive.
Do not belittle sins, and do not delay repentance.
If the heart is pure, the tongue becomes pure.
Avoiding evil is an act of worship.
Whoever trusts Allah will not be lost.
Trust is the foundation of relationships.
Let your words heal, not wound.
Seeking knowledge is lighting a lamp in darkness.
Worship is not only prayer, but also good behavior.
Even a small good deed is valuable.
A smile is charity.
Protecting what is entrusted to you is part of faith.
Lies corrupt the heart.
Slander is among the heaviest sins.
The door of repentance is always open.
Allah’s justice never fails.
A person is accountable for their words.
The end of patience is peace.
Good intentions soften even difficult matters.
Do not hold grudges; keep your heart clean.
Being content with what Allah gives brings peace.
Loving for Allah is a great blessing.
Doing good after a sin purifies the heart.
Wealth gains meaning when shared.
Wastefulness removes blessings.
Haram earnings darken the heart.
Try to improve yourself every day.
Arrogance is the path of Satan.
Humility is the believer’s beauty.
Greeting others spreads love.
The heart finds peace by remembering Allah.
Whoever does good, does good for themselves.
Do not be unjust; fear the prayer of the oppressed.
Injustice destroys peace.
Kind words are the strongest advice.
Allah loves sincerity.
Do not be a burden to people; be a support.
Allah’s mercy leaves no room for despair.
Keep your heart clean, and your life will improve.
Bad habits weaken the soul.
Hidden good deeds are more valuable.
Avoid hurting people.
Good character is the strongest invitation.
Do not forget that you are a guest in this world.
Every day is a new beginning.
Whoever turns to Allah will not be lost.
Competing in goodness makes life better.
